<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.6-Solothurn">
  <identifier>GDB_VCGI.VCGI_ADMIN.Utility_GMP_Poles_point</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>UtilityTransmit_GMPPOLES</title>
  <abstract>Green Mountain Power (GMP) pole distribution model, linear distribution model, underground structure distribution model, and a pole-attachments table. The pole-attachments table is available by downloading a file-geodatabase bundle of the entire dataset (poles, lines, underground structures, and pole-attachments table) from https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Iz7SPnYOnWqpepk5zw6zG7prX6ioosvN/view?usp=sharing.

For general planning and to facilitate applications to attach to poles.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="Search keys">
    <keyword>poles</keyword>
    <keyword>Facilities</keyword>
    <keyword>2017</keyword>
    <keyword>distribution lines</keyword>
    <keyword>Green Mountain Power</keyword>
    <keyword>Vermont</keyword>
    <keyword>utilitiesCommunication</keyword>
    <keyword>utility</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>utilitiesCommunication</keyword>
    <keyword>poles</keyword>
    <keyword>Facilities</keyword>
    <keyword>distribution lines</keyword>
    <keyword>Green Mountain Power</keyword>
    <keyword>utility</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <contact>
    <contactAddress>
      <type>both</type>
      <address>1 National Life Dr, Dewey Building, 2nd Floor</address>
      <city>Montpelier</city>
      <administrativearea>VT</administrativearea>
      <postalcode>05620-2001</postalcode>
      <country>US</country>
    </contactAddress>
    <name>GIS Database Administrator</name>
    <organization>VT Center for Geographic Information</organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice>802/882-3002</voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email></email>
    <role>Point of contact</role>
  </contact>
  <links>
    <link type="ESRI Shapefile format (compressed into ZIP file format)" name="SHP" url="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Iz7SPnYOnWqpepk5zw6zG7prX6ioosvN/view?usp=sharing" size="" description="" format="" mimeType=""/>
    <link type="ESRI Shapefile format (compressed into ZIP file format)" name="SHP" url="" size="" description="" format="" mimeType=""/>
  </links>
  <history>Data source: </history>
  <dates>
    <date value="2022-03-30T00:00:00" type="Published"/>
  </dates>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Security constraints"></constraints>
  <rights>Green Mountain Power</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["NAD83 / Vermont",BASEGEOGCRS["NAD83",DATUM["North American Datum 1983",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4269]],CONVERSION["SPCS83 Vermont zone (meter)",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",42.5,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",-72.5,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.999964286,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["easting (X)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Engineering survey, topographic mapping."],AREA["United States (USA) - Vermont - counties of Addison; Bennington; Caledonia; Chittenden; Essex; Franklin; Grand Isle; Lamoille; Orange; Orleans; Rutland; Washington; Windham; Windsor."],BBOX[42.72,-73.44,45.03,-71.5]],ID["EPSG",32145]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=tmerc +lat_0=42.5 +lon_0=-72.5 +k=0.999964286 +x_0=500000 +y_0=0 +ellps=GRS80 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>2806</srsid>
      <srid>32145</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:32145</authid>
      <description>NAD83 / Vermont</description>
      <projectionacronym>tmerc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial dimensions="2" minx="-73.45420000000000016" maxx="-71.46529999999999916" miny="42.72279999999999944" maxy="45.01839999999999975" crs="EPSG:32145" minz="0" maxz="0"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start>2022-03-30T04:00:00Z</start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
